signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, BELOW FORECASTS AMID MIDDLE EAST OIL SHOCK** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, missing market expectations of 2.4% as reported by Statistics Korea; this marks the latest confirmed data point, with prior Bank of Korea rate hold at 2.5% (7th consecutive

signals.headline: X Platform Bets (Nikita Bier, USD Stablecoin) Trending Sans Whale Signals | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
X Platform Bets (Nikita Bier, USD Stablecoin) Trending Sans Whale Signals | NO | LOW confidence**  
Markets like "Nikita Bier out as Head of Product at X by June 30?" and "Will X launch a USD stablecoin in 2026?" draw X posts on potential tech shifts, but lack volume data or confirmed announcements to move prices[1]. No resolutions, whale moves, or mispriced calls confirmed in feeds[1][3].
